name: search_parking_lines_by_location
description: Searches for on-street parking lines/zones within a specified geographic bounding box. Returns available street parking locations filtered by latitude/longitude bounds and zoom level. Enables users to discover on-street parking options within a defined map area.

maxLat.description: Maximum latitude of the bounding box (northern boundary)

maxLon.description: Maximum longitude of the bounding box (eastern boundary)

minLat.description: Minimum latitude of the bounding box (southern boundary)

minLon.description: Minimum longitude of the bounding box (western boundary)

zoom.description: Map zoom level (typically ranges from 0-22, higher values represent more detailed/closer zoom levels)
